title: Collector's Caravan
description:
Collect fossils, insects, meteorites and more!
A mod made for collectors
body:
COLLECT MOBS AND ITEMS!
Have you ever wanted a mod that adds random items, mobs and doesn't add weird mechanics? 
These items are meant to be collected, they serve no particular purpose. Same as the mobs, they serve no purpose other than collection.

![Authors looking at a lot of collectibles ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a5a57f19270ef5b7d6f611b0b10cb986b8df2b_0.webp)
